ns0:entry.ns0:title: Hainrixz/whatsapp-agentkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Hainrixz/whatsapp-agentkit
Language: shell
Construye tu propio agente de WhatsApp con inteligencia artificial en menos de 30 minutos. No necesitas saber programar. Claude Code construye todo por ti.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leonxlnx/taste-skill
Language: shell
Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: shell
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh
Language: shell
🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: obra/superpowers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh
Language: shell
🙃 A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
